testMethod: code-analysis + static-verification (Playwright browser automation failed: Phaser v3.90.0 crashes all headless browser engines on this Windows system)

bugs.desc: INACTIVITY_WARN (6000ms) defined in config.js but never implemented in game.js. update() is empty - no inactivity warning shown to player. Infection spread acts as implicit death timer but player gets no visual 'place walls!' warning.
Mutation notification text starts at x:370 (10px past 360px viewport) then tweens to x:20. Slide-in animation is intentional but technically starts offscreen.

Inconsistent button callback pattern: MenuScene PLAY button fires on pointerup (ui.js:77), but GameOverScene buttons fire on pointerdown (ui.js:235). Pause menu buttons also fire on pointerdown (ui.js:184). Should be consistent.
Double-tap wall reclaim (stage 6+) has no visual indicator telling player when feature becomes available. Only discoverable via Help scene.
GameOverScene.create() calls AdManager.showInterstitial() synchronously before building UI (ui.js:206). If ad SDK were integrated, this could delay game over screen render.

codeAnalysis.texturePattern: CORRECT - addBase64 only in BootScene (main.js:79), no restart collision
codeAnalysis.canvasDisplay: CORRECT - no display:none on canvas, only on rotate-overlay
codeAnalysis.stageTransitioning: CORRECT - stageTransitioning flag guards spreadInfection(), onEdgeBreach(), onStageCleared(), checkContainment()
codeAnalysis.edgeBreach: CORRECT - infection reaching row 0/max or col 0/max triggers onEdgeBreach()
codeAnalysis.gameOver: CORRECT - 3 lives, lives-- on breach, lives<=0 triggers GameOverScene
codeAnalysis.containment: CORRECT - BFS flood fill from infected cells, if all reachable cells are walls/infected (no empty), stage clears
codeAnalysis.orientationHandler: CORRECT - CSS media query + JS handler, uses visibility changes appropriately
codeAnalysis.pauseSystem: CORRECT - pauses spread timer, blocks input, resume restores timer and activity timestamp

analysis.wallPlacement: Instant with camera shake (60ms, 0.0015 intensity), particle burst (6 particles, 30px radius), haptic feedback (15ms vibrate). Responsive and satisfying.
analysis.containmentFeedback: Stage clear triggers 20-particle burst, float text (+pts), score text scale animation (1.3x). PERFECT bonus (200pts) shown as gold float text when using minimal walls.
analysis.infectionVisuals: 6 distinct mutation types with unique colors (green/yellow/purple/red/orange/grey). Each has 3-dot 'biohazard' pattern. Edge-adjacent cells get danger outline.
analysis.deathFeedback: Edge breach: 300ms camera shake (8x stronger than wall), red flash overlay, life indicator update. Fair - player can see infections approaching edges.
analysis.stageProgression: 9-tier difficulty table: grid grows 6->8->10->12, infections increase 1->5, spread interval decreases 2000ms->1000ms, mutations unlock progressively. Every 5th stage is a breather.
analysis.mutationSystem: 5 unique mutations (diagonal spread, jump over walls, split on wall hit, accelerate spread, dormant 3-tick bomb). Shuffled per run seed. Adds genuine variety and strategic depth.
analysis.wallManagement: Limited wall supply creates resource tension. Efficiency bonus rewards conservation. Wall reclaim (double-tap, stage 6+) adds advanced technique.
analysis.scoring: Multi-factor: contained cells (10ea) + stage clear (100) + wall efficiency (20/wall saved) + perfect bonus (200) + mutation survived (50). Combo system with 2s window.
analysis.helpSystem: Comprehensive HelpScene with illustrated mini-grid, mutation color guide, scrollable content. Accessible from menu and pause.
analysis.overallFeel: Strategic puzzle with time pressure. The containment mechanic creates satisfying 'close the walls!' moments. Mutations add unpredictability. Score system rewards efficiency.

playerOne.stagesCleared: estimated 3-5 (based on wall supply vs infection count analysis)

sessions.note: Code analysis - session variety confirmed via seeded RNG
Different runSeed produces different mutation order (shuffleMutations), different infection placements (placeInfections)
Stage generation uses runSeed + stageNumber * 7919 for per-stage uniqueness

replayTester.highScoreNote: localStorage with STORAGE_KEYS.HIGH_SCORE, try/catch wrapped, checked in MenuScene display and GameOverScene 'NEW BEST!' logic
replayTester.mutationNote: 5 mutations shuffled per runSeed, unlocked progressively through 9 difficulty tiers. Different run = different mutation encounter order.
replayDrivers: High score chase (visible on menu, NEW BEST! celebration)
Mutation shuffle per run creates different strategic challenges
Efficiency scoring rewards skill improvement (fewer walls = more points)
Stage progression is clear motivator (stage counter in HUD)
Breather stages every 5th stage provide pacing
Wall reclaim mechanic (stage 6+) adds skill ceiling
replayWeaknesses: No meta-progression (no unlocks, achievements, or persistent upgrades)
Stats screen is minimal (high score, highest stage, games played only)

pauseNote: GameScene.pauseGame() sets paused=true, pauses spreadTimerEvent. resumeGame() restores both. UIScene.togglePause() shows/hides overlay with Resume/How To Play/Restart/Quit options.
orientationHandling: CSS @media query for landscape + JS resize handler. Overlay blocks gameplay, auto-pauses GameScene.
adIntegration: Placeholder only (POC stage). AdManager has interstitial (every 3rd game over), rewarded continue (+1 life), rewarded supply (+5 walls), rewarded double score. All simulate with setTimeout.
screenshotNote: Screenshots could not be captured - Phaser v3.90.0 WebGL/Canvas renderer crashes all Playwright browser engines (Chromium, Firefox, WebKit) on this Windows system. This is an environment issue, not a game bug.
